name: Sea
tagline: I build production-grade web applications end to end - from pixel-perfect frontends to resilient backends, payment flows, and the CI/CD pipelines that ship them.
quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
about: I am a full-stack engineer focused on web applications and e-commerce. I work across the whole stack: React / Next.js and Vue / Nuxt on the frontend, Node.js, Python / Django, and PHP on the backend.

Beyond application code, I own the delivery side too: Docker and Kubernetes, GitOps with ArgoCD, and automated pipelines with GitHub Actions. I care about clean architecture, secure defaults, and code the next developer can read.

projects.title: Headless E-Commerce Storefront
projects.description: A high-performance storefront built on Next.js with the Shopify Storefront API. Stripe-powered checkout, ISR product pages, and Core Web Vitals in the green.

projects.title: SaaS Admin Dashboard
projects.description: A multi-tenant admin platform with role-based access control, real-time updates, and reporting. Django REST backend with a Vue 3 frontend.

projects.title: GitOps Delivery Platform
projects.description: Kubernetes-based delivery setup with ArgoCD app-of-apps, sealed secrets, and GitHub Actions pipelines promoting builds from staging to production.

highlights: Delivered e-commerce builds on Shopify and WooCommerce, including custom themes, apps, and payment integrations.
Designed and shipped REST and GraphQL APIs backed by PostgreSQL and MongoDB.
Set up CI/CD pipelines and Kubernetes deployments with GitOps workflows.
